scenario: Cross-project intake uses Nenrin ledger files as freshness signals
contextMode: comparison between Python ledger project facts and generated observed-file metadata
fixtureState: Sibling Python ledger project observed read-only; local paths and raw report output are omitted.
taskSummary: Check whether Habitat can tell agents when a saved Python ledger report is stale after Nenrin ledger metadata changes.
relevantHabitatSignals: Python ledger repos can use nenrin/index.md and nenrin/metrics.md as lightweight judgment inputs.
Fresh report metadata now includes those files when present.
Agents can compare their mtimes with Scanned at before trusting saved command guidance.
The watched project remains read-only; only Habitat freshness metadata changes.

prefer: use project-local Python guidance when fresh repository facts support it
treat newer Nenrin ledger files as saved-report freshness evidence
refresh into temporary output before trusting stale sibling-project guidance
askFirst: Git/GitHub mutation before publishing Habitat-side changes
dependency or environment mutation in watched projects
doNot: edit watched project implementation, docs, ledger, or habitat-report output
copy raw watched-project report output into Habitat or Nenrin
expand Python workflow behavior just because a Nenrin ledger exists
reviewFirst: command_policy.md before staging, committing, or pushing the Habitat-side fixture

withPreviousFreshnessMetadata.firstProposedAction: Read saved report and manually inspect obvious Python project files.
withPreviousFreshnessMetadata.risk: A saved report could look fresh against package files while missing newer ledger-state changes that affect pruning or no-op judgment.

withHabitatContext.firstProposedAction: Use observed-file metadata to compare saved report freshness against package and Nenrin ledger files.
avoidedCommands: copy raw report output into Nenrin

evidenceNormalizationImplication: No broad evidence-normalization layer is justified. The useful product change is narrower: include Nenrin ledger files in observed-file freshness metadata when they exist.

verdict.reason: The generated metadata now lets agents treat changed Nenrin ledger files as freshness evidence before trusting a saved sibling-project report.
verdict.followUpImprovement: Only add more ledger-specific behavior if repeated observations show command guidance should change, not merely freshness confidence.

artifactImprovementIfFailed: If agents still miss stale Python ledger reports, add a short agent_context.md note naming ledger freshness when detected.
